narrative:
Jackson County has 19,840 registered voters, with 54.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.5 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 28.7% of registrants.
